overview: SynergenX provides customized testosterone replacement therapy for men and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for women, along with medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapy. Care is supervised by board-certified professionals.
highlights: Customized TRT tailored to individual hormone levels and goals
Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for women
Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapies
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone, women managing menopausal hormone changes, and individuals seeking medically supervised weight loss.
